# Environment Context: Webcert Devtest

> Generated by Copilot via playwright-cli exploration — March 2026.
> Used by `playwright-flow.prompt.md` Step 0 to give the agent environment-specific knowledge before writing tests.

---

## Base URL

```
https://webcert-devtest.intyg.nordicmedtest.se/welcome.html
```

---

## Browser Mode

Always open the browser in **headed mode** so the developer can see navigation in real time:
```bash
playwright-cli open --headed [url]
```

---

## Authentication

**Method:** Fake login via the welcome page (no real credentials required).

**Flow:**
1. Navigate to base URL — a test login UI is presented.
2. Select a user from the **"Användare"** dropdown (default: `Ajla Doktor (Läkare)`).
3. Optionally check **"Skapa nytt utkast/intyg?"** to create a certificate draft inline during login.
4. Click **"Logga in"** → lands directly on the certificate page (if draft was created) or the dashboard.
5. You need to login as "Fristående" or "Djupintegration". "Fristående" is easier since it's only a checkbox. 

**Important — hidden checkbox workaround:**
The "Skapa nytt utkast/intyg?" checkbox input is hidden and cannot be directly checked.
Use the label click instead:
```js
await page.locator('label[for=isCreateNewCertificate]').click();
```

---

## Test Users

| Display name | Role | Use for |
|---|---|---|
| `Ajla Doktor (Läkare)` | Läkare | Default — draft creation, signing |
| `Alf Doktor (Läkare)` | Läkare | Secondary doctor |
| `Alva Vårdadministratör (Vårdadmin)` | Vårdadmin | Admin flows |
| `Anna Sjuksköterska (Sjuksköterska)` | Sjuksköterska | Nurse flows |

---

## Creating Test Certificates

Done directly from the welcome page login form. No external API call needed.

**Options available in the form:**

| Field | Element | Values |
|---|---|---|
| Patient | `combobox "Namn"` | `Athena Andersson` (default), `Alve Alfridsson`, etc. |
| Certificate type | radio buttons | See certificate types below |
| Version | `combobox` next to type | e.g. `2.0` for FK7804 |
| Status | `combobox` (`e91`-ish) | `UNSIGNED`, `SIGNED`, `LOCKED` |
| Fill type | `combobox` (`e94`-ish) | `EMPTY`, `MAXIMAL` |

**Select fill type via:**
```js
await page.locator('#fillTypelisjp').selectOption(['MAXIMAL']);
```
*(The `#fillTypelisjp` id encodes the certificate type — verify after changing type)*

---

## Certificate Types

| Name | Code |
|---|---|
| Läkarintyg för sjukpenning | FK 7804 *(pre-selected)* |
| Arbetsförmedlingens medicinska utlåtande | AF00213 |
| Läkarintyg FK 7263 | FK 7263 |
| Intyg om graviditet | fk7210 |
| Intyg om tillfällig föräldrapenning | fk7472 |
| Läkarintyg för högre körkortsbehörigheter | ts8071 |
| Dödsbevis | — |
| Dödsorsaksintyg | — |

---

## Navigation

After login with draft creation, the browser is redirected to:
```
/certificate/{uuid}/
```

The certificate ID is in the URL — capture it for test assertions if needed.

---

## Known UI Behaviours

| Behaviour | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Händelser modal** | Opened via button `"Visa alla händelser"`. Shows a loading message `"Laddar händelser"` — wait for it to disappear before asserting. |
| **Draft events** | A new UNSIGNED draft has exactly **1 event**: `"Utkastet är skapat"` |
| **Signed FK7804 events** | Signing produces **3 events**: `"Utkastet är skapat"` → `"Intyget är signerat"` → `"Intyget är tillgängligt för patienten"` |
| **Sign button** | `data-testid="sign-certificate-button"` — only enabled when draft status shows `"Klart att signera"` (requires MAXIMAL fill) |
| **Integration origins** | Tests often parameterise over `"NORMAL"` and `"DJUPINTEGRATION"` — set via the login form's `"Aktivera integrationsparametrar"` checkbox |

---

## Integration Parameters (DJUPINTEGRATION)

Check `"Aktivera integrationsparametrar"` on the welcome page before logging in to activate deep-integration mode. This is reflected in the JSON profile shown in `"Inloggningsprofil"`:
```json
{ "origin": "DJUPINTEGRATION" }
```

---

## Testdata Server

| Environment | URL |
|---|---|
| systest | `https://testdata-server-systest.intyg.nordicmedtest.se` |
| dev (local) | `http://localhost:8888` |

Certificates can also be pre-created via the testdata server API (used by Gradle/JUnit tests via `testSetupBuilder()`).
